title: Battle of the Jade Moon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Liberation of Gerrard V]][[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] |conc= |next=[[Raid on Balmorra]] |image=[[File:Rogue_Squadron_Jade_Moon.jpg]] |name=Battle of the Jade Moon |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] |place=[[Jade Moon]] |result=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] victory *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supply depot destroyed |side1=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Kasan Moor]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*4 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] *4 [[combat vehicle]]s *[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce commandos]] |forces2=*3 [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] *3 [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] *9 [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] *10 [[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolasers]] *9 [[Concussion missile/Legends|Missile turrets]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Small |casual2=*All TIE bombers *All ground forces |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Luke, how do we know Kasan isn't leading us right into a trap?''"
"''Not now, Wedge.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] over Wedge's doubts on trusting Kasan Moor|}} A '''battle''' at the [[Jade Moon]] took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], immediately after the [[liberation of Gerrard V]]. The battle was a raid led by former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starfighter pilot [[Kasan Moor]] following her defection to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The [[Jade Moon]] of [[Loronar/Legends|Loronar]] was being used as a supply depot for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and featured a factory of [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] and blaster rifles. The attack was twofold: a ground attack with backup from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. With the operation a success for the Alliance, the attention turned to other military installations that Kasan Moor had reported. ==Prelude== During the liberation of Gerrard V, the leader of the [[128th TIE Interceptor Squadron]], [[Kasan Moor]], surrendered herself after her [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] was disabled by [[Gold Leader/Legends|Gold Leader]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]. She donated her interceptor to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cause and supplied the Rebellion with a number of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] installation locations. One such installation was on the Jade Moon. The location of a military supply depot, it was an essential factory for [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] and [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] gathered its members and set to the supply moon. ==The battle== A team of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForce commandos]] arrived at the moon using a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]. Touching down, they infiltrated the moon and set off toward the supply base, but were immediately intercepted by [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT]] walkers. Rogue Squadron flew down and took out the walker attackers, allowing the convoy of [[combat vehicle]]s to proceed. Upon the arrival at the depot, a [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shield]] was activated, preventing attack. [[File:Imperial_base_Jade_Moon.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Rebel vehicles attack the Imperial base.]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and Rogue Squadron scouted out the trenches covering the moon for the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]. Upon discovering it, Luke fired a volley of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|Proton torpedoes]] into the hull, allowing attack on the depot. With the shield deactivated, commandos deployed from the trains and infiltrated the facility. Rogue Squadron covered from the air, taking out [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] and bombarding the surface. The outlying facility was left in rubble, and the commandos finished the job of sabotaging and looting the depot. ==Aftermath== The operation was deemed a success by the Alliance. The success proved the trustworthiness of [[Kasan Moor]] and the information she provided. Kasan commented on how strange it felt to attack the Empire, after taking their orders for so long. Luke assured her that he was glad she joined the Rebellion, telling her that she was fighting for her own ideals now. Kasan was not entirely convinced however. Soon after the battle, Rogue Squadron launched an attack on the [[Imperial construction yard]] on [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]] with the information supplied to them by Moor. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{CSWECite|II||Jade Moon}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW_1_ABY}} {{Interlang |de=Scharmützel beim Jade-Mond |es=Batalla de la Luna de Jade }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Jade Moon, battle of the}} [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Battles of the Jade Moon]]
